From:

mccoughney@bontoncityapartments.tna

To:

<d target="data_ilya_email">ilya.vhart@bontonmail.tna</d>

Received:

8.15 a.m. on March 21, 2017

Subject:

Overdue apartment rent

Dear Mr Vhart,
<el>
Unfortunately we have to inform you that we did not receive payment for your monthly rent for the following address:
<el>
<d target="data_ilya_address">Apartment 303
Penn Street 125
9R-BT Bonton</d>
<el>
Rent for the month of March was due on March 3, 2017. <d target="data_ilya_overdue">However, our payment records state that the outstanding amount of $865.00 has not been received.</d>
<el>
This is the third time that your rent has been overdue, so we will forward this matter to our debt collection agency if you do not make payment in the next five business days. 
<el>
If you have made payment in the past three business days, please disregard this letter. A $30.00 overdue fee will be deducted from your <d target="data_ilya_bankacc">bank account 336 100 181 01</d> with the next monthly statement. We would like to take this opportunity to remind you that failure to pay could result in eviction, and court proceedings.
<el>
Regards,
<el>
Donald McCoughney
Manager Penn St Apartments

--
Thank you for renting at Penn St Apartments.
Don't rack your brains over it. I only did the necessary thing to expose the lies of The National Beholder.
Now, with the world seeing the Beholder for what it really is, and finally shifting their attention to The People's Voice, I am ready to take the next step.
I called to warn you about the consequences. The People's Voice will gain even more attention, and it won't only be from our followers.
<d target="data_raban_karennotthreaten">I will not allow you to threaten the reputation of The People's Voice!</d>
Already? The People's Voice has a new announcement. We should tune in as soon as possible.
There's massive fallout due to our little "intervention." The National Beholder is met with public distrust, and - by extension - so is the government.
This casts a shadow over The People's Voice. Raban will have to react, and the focus on this article will surely suffer.
This casts a shadow over The People's Voice. It doesn't matter that he published the article, we will divert attention away from it.
Mhm. The People's Voice has a new announcement. We should tune in as soon as possible.
Those... delicate pictures will spark a discussion big enough to divert attention from The People's Voice. A form of damage control.
GODDAMN! Raban released a new article on The People's Voice. It's the provocation he spoke about!
He is the lead editor at The People's Voice.

brother I need your help asap!

there's... <d target="data_ilya_impliedmeds">i may have done something stupid at work and today supplies are gone</d> and i am supposed to issue a statement and now the police has been raiding the watergate offices! did you see the latest tnb report? <l target="website_beholder_watergate">www.the-national-beholder.tna/new-watergate-scandal</l> could these be the consequences you have been warning us about??

what am i gonna do, can you advise? i need you now!

Brother,

YOU CANNOT BE SERIOUS. HOW CAN YOU BE THIS IRRESPONSIBLE?

I hope for your sake that you're not involved with the supplies! You know The People's Voice cannot afford to be connected to anything REMOTELY conspicuous. Our enemies are waiting for any opportunity, no matter how small. We cannot afford giving them anything in the slightest!

Now stay at home and write the damn statement, lest you make things even worse. After today nobody will care about this anymore.

Dear Mrs. Levine-Vhart,
<el>
It has been brought to our attention that your patient no. NA-32694 has been involved in a criminal case. She has been taken into custody and the case is now being investigated thoroughly. As you know, a situation like this requires a report by the therapeutic counsellor who treated her.
<el>
We therefore kindly ask you to hand in your report on Mrs. Maternova by the end of the day. Please be informed that this report is highly important for the case and will be used in court. <el>
Yours sincerely,
<el>
Esther Backer

9F-BT Bonton

raban, it's a lie. it's all a lie.

i'm not your friend. i've never been. i can't fully explain it at this time, i've only been here recently.

David,

Your loyalty to me is beyond any limits. <d target="data_raban_davidlongtime">You have been with me from the start. The People's Voice would not nearly have become what it is had you not been there. You're more than a fan. You're a true friend.</d>

But I'm tired. I've been writing furiously all day to this point, and look where it got me. Nowhere. Everything around me is falling apart. I have no one left. Even my followers are turning their backs on me.

It's over. It has to end. I want it to end.

Thank you. For standing with me.
